goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 accepted-memory dogfood 链路总览

summary.title: 增加 accepted-memory dogfood 链路总览
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/accepted-memory-dogfood-status.ts 和 focused tests，把 Catty v0 的 canary queue、promotion apply preview、pending accepted-memory write requests、writer receipt preview、external receipt verify、verified receipt apply commit preview、applied receipts 合并成一个只读状态入口，并在 src/catty/README.md 记录 CLI 和安全边界。
summary.why: 前序切片已经把 canary、promotion、accepted-memory request、receipt verify 和 receipt-backed apply commit 拆成多个受控步骤；继续 dogfood 时需要一个总览入口快速看链路推进到哪里、卡在哪个 stage，以及当前哪些副作用被明确禁止，而不是让后续 agent 在多个 dry-run/list CLI 之间手工拼状态。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 accepted-memory dogfood 链路总览

decisions.chose: 只做 read-only dogfood status/CLI，不实现真实 accepted-memory writer，也不调用 receipt-backed commit。
decisions.rationale: goal 要推进真实 dogfood 可诊断性，但 user memory writer 和 promoted commit 仍是高风险写入边界，需要独立显式步骤。

decisions.chose: 聚合现有 canary/request/receipt/apply dry-run 和 list API，并按 stage 汇总 blocked reason。
decisions.rationale: 这样后续 agent 能从一个 JSON 看出 pending request、receipt preview、receipt verify、apply commit preview 和 safety boundary，而不改变已有协议语义。

decisions.chose: 支持可选 --receipt-json，只把外部 writer receipt 纳入 dry-run verify 和 commit preview。
decisions.rationale: 没有 receipt 时应显示 missing_receipt blocked；有 receipt 时应能预览它是否可以进入 commit bundle，但仍不提交。

decisions.chose: 把 preflight 列出的 Catty proposed intents 分类为同一分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 本轮只组合并读取它们暴露的能力，不反向修改真实 trail、judge、store、canary queue/status 或 receipt-backed commit 的核心决策。

rejected.alternative: 在总览 CLI 里执行 --write、调用真实 writer 或提交 apply receipt
rejected.reason: 会把诊断入口变成状态推进入口，模糊 user memory 写入和 promoted commit 的审计边界。

rejected.alternative: 只更新 README 说明现有 CLI 顺序
rejected.reason: 不能给后续 agent 一个可测试、可机器读取的当前链路状态和 blocked reason 聚合。

rejected.alternative: 把总览接进 heartbeat 或 nightly runner
rejected.reason: 当前切片是手动 read-only observability；调度策略和自动运行不属于本轮。

acknowledged_constraints.note: status 总览不会写用户长期 memory，也不会调用未来 writer。
总览只读取 canary/request/receipt/apply 状态，不从 prediction 或 judgement 生成 memory。
没有新增模型调用，也没有接 launchd heartbeat 或 nightly runner。
CLAUDE.md 是既有无关 unstaged dirty，本轮未 stage、未提交。

review_notes: TDD RED：focused test 先因缺少 ./accepted-memory-dogfood-status 模块失败。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/accepted-memory-dogfood-status.test.ts，2 pass，17 expect。

验证通过：bun test src/catty/accepted-memory-dogfood-status.test.ts src/catty/accepted-memory-*.test.ts src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-write-request.test.ts src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.test.ts，18 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，57 pass；bun test，62 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 与 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
CLI smoke：--help 正常；bad --receipt-json 退出 2；--write 被拒绝并退出 2；live empty summary 返回全 0 且 blockedByStage=[]。

runtime readback：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，last observe ok，last full pipeline ok，heartbeat installed/loaded/not running；日志最近为 heartbeat ok，stderr 为空。launchd last exit code=2 对应 locked skip 读数，未影响 status file ok。

architectural_claims: accepted-memory dogfood status is a read-only aggregation layer over existing Catty v0 canary, request, receipt verify and apply preview APIs.
The status CLI is an observability surface, not a state transition surface.
Future accepted-memory writer and receipt-backed commit remain explicit separate boundaries.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/accepted-memory-dogfood-status.ts prints a JSON summary of total canaries, ready apply plans, pending requests, writer receipt previews, input receipts, verified receipts, ready commit receipts, applied receipts and total blocked items.

The status result includes stages.canaryQueue, stages.promotionApplyPreview, stages.acceptedMemoryWriteRequests, stages.writerPreflight, stages.receiptVerify, stages.applyCommitPreview and stages.appliedReceipts.
blockedByStage groups block reasons for promotion apply preview, receipt verify and apply commit preview.
--receipt-json accepts one receipt or an array and feeds only dry-run verify/preview logic.

api_changes.signature: inspectAcceptedMemoryDogfoodStatus(options?: { storeDbPath?: string; receipts?: AcceptedMemoryWriteReceipt[]; now?: string; writer?: string }): AcceptedMemoryDogfoodStatusResult

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, ~/.agents/memory/config.json, model provider env vars, or payload_json are read or printed by the new status module.
The status module does not write user memory, catty_memory_audit, apply receipts, canary status, or request tables.
The status module does not call model providers and is not attached to heartbeat or nightly runner.
migration_notes: The new module is additive and reads existing Catty tables through missing-table-safe list/preview APIs.
